- "Messié Pizza Sin Gluten" clearly indicates gluten-free pizza, so this maps to either "Pizza Parlor" (rating 7) or "Gluten-Free Eatery" (rating 10). Given it's specifically gluten-free focused, "Gluten-Free Eatery" is more appropriate.
